title: Fred Totem
description: A pack to change Totems into Fred the Rubber Duck
body:
# FRED TOTEM
**Fred the Rubber Duck is now your Totem of Undying!**

**The official MEEP5783 Totem of Undying Pack**

No mods required!

## In Game
![A picture of a pixelated Fred](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f9c5aa65926870eecef2534cb15a5bc28e730671_0.webp)

### Socials
You can see this texture pack in action in [MEEP5783](https://www.youtube.com/@MEEP5783)'s videos and make sure to join the [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/wu4UxsXSS7)

**Disclaimer**
You are allowed to use anything in this texture pack in your own pack, just make sure to credit this pack in some way. You are not allowed to make your own version of this pack without changing something. You are also not allowed to take the Fred texture and call it your own.

## FAQ

<details>
<summary>Q: Am I allowed to use this in my own pack?</summary>

A: Yes as long as you credit this pack or me in some way

</details>

<details>
<summary>Q: Am I allowed to make a fork or unofficial version of this pack?</summary>

A: No, unless you contact me and I give you permission or you change something noticeable in the pack

</details>

<details>
<summary>Q: Can I retexture other things to Fred?</summary>

A: Yes, customize the pack however you like

</details>
